subcodes.first_line: A remembrance from Us unto him who hath turned towards God, the Lord of the worlds, and who hath arisen to serve the Cause [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ذکر من لدنا لمن اقبل الی الله رب العالمین و قام علی خدمه الامر اذ کان
subcodes.subjects: @proclamation to kings; rulers; prominent individuals, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @praise and encouragement, @suffering and imprisonment, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
